text:
Every night at sunset.

A boy loves insects.

He collects butterflies.

They flutter softly.

Nothing flies right.




Just love butterflies.




They settle.

Just love butterflies.




Just me.



Just you.



Just butterflies.




Just love butterflies.




Just sleep.




Just me.




Just butterflies.




Just sleep.




Just...

Just birds.




Just love butterflies.




Just...













Just me.



Just butterflies.


Just sleep.





just love.





Just birds.



Just sleep.




Just butterflies.




So sleep.




Just birds.




Just love.





just butterflies.



Just dreams.





Just birds.




Just sleep.




Just birds.





Just sleep.




Just love.





Just fly.




Just butterflies.




Just sleep.



Just fly.



Just sleep.




Just flies.




Just breathe....



Just owls.




Just love.





Just birds.




Just sleep.





Just butterflies.




Just love.




Just sleep.




Just look.





Just fly.

Just owls.





Just love.




Just sleep.



Just birds.




Just dreams.




Just wings.



Just flutter.





Just owls.




Just love.
